generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our civil defense programs to undermine national security? While we focus on preparedness, they're using these programs to gather intelligence and weaken our resilience. It's time to demand accountability from our leaders and ensure our tax dollars are spent wisely. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
